title: LIA-016 women in pain - Hibiki Otsuki
overview: A white bandage that gently wraps around the small body of a wounded woman. It was a double-edged sword that protected the painful parts and at the same time exposed the weak points to people. Dirty human trash who calls such a sickly woman a massage. Strong with painful hands ● Strong masturbation and strong deep throat using scarred hands and mouth. It is a must-see problem work for sad men who get excited by the face of a woman who is distorted by suffering.
